title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Virginia voters approve new congressional map favoring Democrats, CBS News projects

items.title: Iran war: Trump's pattern of setting unenforced deadlines
items.description: This time around, the president did not provide a new deadline for how long the ceasefire extension will last.

items.title: Georgia Democratic Rep. David Scott dies at 80
items.description: Scott served in the House for more than 23 years.

items.title: WATCH:  New Nat Geo doc highlights alarming decline of the honeybee
items.description: The new National Geographic documentary “Secret of the Bees” offers a glimpse into the world and importance of bees.

items.title: WATCH:  Baby elephant makes debut on Earth Day
items.description: The elephant calf made her public debut as the first Asian elephant born at the National Zoo in more than 25 years.

items.title: Rep. David Scott, longtime Georgia lawmaker, dead at 80
items.description: U.S. Rep. David Scott, who represented Georgia's 13th District for over two decades, has died at 80 years old.

items.title: D4vd murder case: Medical examiner report released on teen's cause of death
items.description: D4vd has been charged with first-degree murder in connection with the death of the teen, Celeste Rivas Hernandez, officials said.
